'''vanoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaffree|zaffree]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaffree|zaffree]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vanoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væneheth|væneheth]] || [[word:vænehej|vænehej]] || [[word:vænehesh|vænehesh]] || [[word:vænehe|vænehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanonohoth|vanonohoth]] || [[word:vanonohoj|vanonohoj]] || [[word:vanonohosh|vanonohosh]] || [[word:vanonoho|vanonoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanohoth|vanohoth]] || [[word:vanohoj|vanohoj]] || [[word:vanohosh|vanohosh]] || [[word:vanoho|vanoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanofhofth|vanofhofth]] || [[word:vanofhofj|vanofhofj]] || [[word:vanofhofsh|vanofhofsh]] || [[word:vanofhof|vanofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanohotho|vanohotho]] || [[word:vanohojo|vanohojo]] || [[word:vanohosho|vanohosho]] || [[word:vanohoko|vanohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanohoth|vanohoth]] || [[word:vanohoj|vanohoj]] || [[word:vanohosh|vanohosh]] || [[word:vanoho|vanoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanohothol|vanohothol]] || [[word:vanohojol|vanohojol]] || [[word:vanohoshol|vanohoshol]] || [[word:vanohokol|vanohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanohoothotho|vanohoothotho]] || [[word:vanohoojojo|vanohoojojo]] || [[word:vanohooshosho|vanohooshosho]] || [[word:vanohooko|vanohooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanohothon|vanohothon]] || [[word:vanohojon|vanohojon]] || [[word:vanohoshon|vanohoshon]] || [[word:vanohokon|vanohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanohothooro|vanohothooro]] || [[word:vanohojooro|vanohojooro]] || [[word:vanohoshooro|vanohoshooro]] || [[word:vanohokooro|vanohokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
